message:
refactor: remove dead wisp table routing functions

Remove unused wispIssueTable, wispEventTable, wispCommentTable functions
that routed by ID substring. All actual routing now uses DB-backed
verification (isActiveWisp, partitionByWispStatus) or the issue.Ephemeral
flag directly. Update stale nolint comments.

Closes bd-o4c, bd-1lc.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
